texto: (…) maybe the heart is an organ on constant ready, always waiting to try again, always open to the next best thing.
explicacao: Citação de Kate Ellison sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “(…) maybe the heart is an organ on constant ready, always waiting to try again, always open to th…” articula amor, heart, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.

texto: It’s not a real place, not a real thing. Mom made up the Gray Space, the place of anti-art, antifeeling, the cold dark place that felt like death. It was just her zany way of describing the place she went when she felt most depressed, when making music at all became impossible.It isn’t real.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kate Ellison: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “It’s not a real place, not a real thing. Mom made up the Gray Space, the place of anti-art, antif…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, art, feelings pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: It’s not a real place, not a real thing. Mom made up the Gray Space, the place of anti-art, antifeeling, the cold dark place that felt like death. It was just her zany way of describing the place she went when she felt most depressed, when making music at all became impossible.It isn’t real.
